title: AutoCen: Automated centromere satellite identification and multi-omics visualization
description: AutoCen identifies centromeric satellite monomers from chromosome-level genome assemblies (TRASH-based tandem-repeat detection, monomer clustering, and genome-wide density mapping) and renders publication-ready figures overlaying satellite, transposable-element, gene, and Hi-C tracks.

creators.name: Xiang, Yunpeng
creators.affiliation: School of Life Science, Southwest University, Chongqing, China
